title: Bring Back the Express! - Elsie Blundell MP
meta_description: Parliamentary Website for Heywood and Middleton North
text_excerpt: Bring Back the Express! - Elsie Blundell MP Skip to main content Elsie Blundell MP Parliamentary Website for Heywood and Middleton North About Contact Campaigns End Furniture Poverty Royal Mail Bring Back the Express! World Book Day Fly High More Menu Bring Back the Express! Bring Back the Express! Will you join me in calling for an express direct-to-Manchester city centre bus service to be reinstated? The service could be an employment life line, an affordable option to access the jobs and opportunities within the Greater Manchester city region, one of the most dynamic economies in the country. I am sending an open letter to Mayor Andy Burnham, calling on him to Bring Back the Express! Read the letter and sign it below. Dear Mayor Andy Burnham, As a resident in Heywood and Middleton North, I want to see a fast and reliable cheap public transport solution to my problem of getting into Manchester City Centre. For work, leisure, education, or health reasons, many people rely on Manchester as the centre of our city region. But not every area can reach the City Centre easily. In fact some areas are being left behind – unable to access the jobs and opportunities that exist. I live in one of those areas. Elsie Blundell MP has been campaigning to Bring Back the Express – an express, direct to Manchester city centre service, serving the areas in her constituency. Her proposal is backed by a survey that shows such a service would be popular with local people and increase their willingness to use the buses. I am adding my name to this open letter as a resident of the area and ask you to Bring Back the Express! Signed, Resident of Heywood and Middleton North via Elsie Blundell MP Bring Back the Express! Sign my open letter to Mayor Andy Burnham and join the community calling for an express direct-to-Manchester city centre bus service to be reinstated. I will add your name to the Open Letter to Mayor Andy Burnham asking him to Bring Back the Express! By submitting you consent to receive communications from me and my office in my role as Member of Parliament and to update you on Mayor Burnham's response. I will send updates and occasional surveys to you, using the contact details above to help me reflect the views and opinions of my constituents in Heywood and Middleton North. Responses in all my surveys are kept confidential. If you want me to respond to you personally about a particular issue, please email me and my casework team: elsie.blundell.mp@parliament.uk I agree to the privacy policy.
